  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Samarijas Pilssahtôs bija / ko
jee Israêta Kehnizu bij darrijschi/
to KUNGII apkaitinadami/ un
wiꞥsch darrija teem ta patt/ ka
wiꞥsch Betelê bij darrijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥsch nokawe wiﬀas
Augstumu Swehtitajns/ kaﬆtur
bija/ us teem Altareem/ un ta-
Dedsinaja Zilveku Kaunus us
teem/ pehz nahze wiꞥsch attat
us Jerusalemi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Kehnisch paweh-
leja wiﬀeem Landim/ fazzidams:
Turrajt tam KUNGAM juh-
fam Deewam tohs Paﬅa-
Swehtkus/ ittin ka fchihs Derri-
bas Grahmata rakstihts irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo tahdi Paﬅa-Sweht-
ki ka fchee/ ne bija turreti tappu-
schi nei Sohgo Laika/ kas Israê-
lu teefaja/ nei wiﬀu Israêta
Kehnizu/ nei to Kehnizu no Juh-
da Laika.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet astotapadefinita Gad-
dá ta Kehniza Josijus/ tappe
fchee Paﬅa-Swehtki tam KUN-
GAM Jerusaleme turreti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Josijus atmette arri-
dsan tohs Sihlneekus un Sih-
mes-Zeenitajus/ tohs Tehlus/ un
Ekus/ un wiﬀas Negantibas/
ka eeksch tahs Semmes Juhda
un Jerusaleme tappereﬆetas/ ka
wiꞥsch ﬁpri turretu tohs Bauf-
libas Wahrdus/ kas tai Grah-
matá rakstihti bij/ ko tas Preeste-
ris Ilkijus ta KUNGA Nam-
ma bij atraddis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un preekfch winna ne bija
tahds Kehnisch tahds wiꞥsch bi-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "jis/ kaß pee to KUNGII buh-
atgreesees no wiﬀas fau-
Sirde/ un no wiﬀas fau-
Dwehfeles/ un ar wiﬀu fau-
Spehku/ pehz wiﬀas Mohsi
Bauflibas/ un pehz winnu arr
dsan tahds/ ka wiꞥsch ne zehlah-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tatschu tas KUNGII
ne atgreesehs no fauas feela
Dufmibas/ ar ko winna Bah-
siba prett Juhdu bija eedegguﬁ
wiﬀas Apkaitischanas deht/
ko Manassus winnu bij apkai-
tinajs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGas fazzija: G-
atuettischu arridsan Juhdu n-
manna Waiga/ ittin ka es Isr-
elu atmettiß/ un mettiychu fch-
Pilssahtu nobst/ ko es biju isr-
dsejs/ prohti Jerusalemi/ un
Nammu/ no ka es biju fazztje-
Mans Wahrdz tur buhs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kaß weht no Josiju
Leetahin atteek/ un wiﬀs /
wiꞥsch irr darrijs/ tas irr rakstiht-
to Kehnizu no Juhda Laik-
Grahmatá.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Winna Laika zehlahs W-
rais Nekus tas Egiptes Ke-
nisch/ prett to Kehnizu no Af-
rijas pee tahs Uppes Wrat. U-
tas Kehnisch Josijus gabje ta-
pretti/ un tas Egiptes Kehnias-
nokawe to eeksch Megiddus/ ka-
tas ar winnu bandijahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un winna Kalpi no we-
de to ( tik ne) nomirritchu n-
Megiddus/ un wedde to us Je-
rusalemi/ un aprakke to win-
Rappa. Un tahs Semnes Lu-
Di
"
